name: Fade
description: "Randomly flies towards a seed and infects it. White seeds will make your screen darker for a bit."
detail1: - Every 10 - 15 seconds fade will go to a random seed, and infect it. Collecting an infected seed will darken your screen for a couple of seconds
detail2: - Fade is a starting enemy and has a limit of 3 permanant Fades and has no temporary cap.
deathmsg: "Butterflies can't kill so no one died." "The infection spreaded to Victim." "And Fade strikes again."
